sticker.alt: Full sticker design: a long horizontal illustration featuring 22 coral reef creatures and features

creatures.name: Megaptera novaeangliae
creatures.description: Whale season is from roughly the middle of June until xxx in Moorea. During this time, you can hear the whales communicating underwater while diving and may be lucky enough to see them beaching offshore throughout the day. Occasionally, the mothers will bring their babies near the reef, protecting them from predators by using the structural boundary of the reef as a natural barrier on one side.
